titleStmt.title: SII 41.270: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 270. (A.R. No. 487 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the third gōpura of the Vataranyesvara temple at Tiruvalangadu, right of entrance.

summary.p: Sale of land, freed from taxes, by the ūrār of Paḻaiyanūr to an adigārigaḷ called Neṟkuṉṟaṅkiḻān Kāman Chandirasēkaran of Mēlūr in Mēlūr-nāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam who had deposited the sale price in the temple treasury. The latter was permitted to reclaim the land, probably for maintaining some temple service.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷer taru taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ
ḷ puṇarntu ceṅkoloccik karuṅkalikaṭintu manṟu pallūḻiyuḷ tenṉavar muvaruḷ mānāparaṇaṉ po
pacun=talai porukaḷattarintu virakeraḷaṉai Āṉai kiṭuvittacaivil cun=tantarapāṇṭiyaṉai ticaikeṭa
tturatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaraicaic ceṇāṭṭotukki mevupukaḻ Irāmakuṭa muvar keṭa munintumi
kalamaṟuppittāhavamallaṉu mañcak kevukeṉṟākkum paṭaiyālāṅkavaṉ ceṉaiyuḷ kaṇ
kātiranum vaṇṭamarkaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyatiṇṭiṟal virutaruvikkiyum vicaiyātittanum karumuraḷ cāṅ
lottuṭai nimir cuṭarpoṉṉoṭayaṅkari puraviyoṭum piṭittut tannāṭaiyil ca
ḷḷippākkaiyuḷḷerimaṭuppittorutanittaṇṭāṟ porun=tiṟaiyuṭuttu Ilaṅkaiyil kaḻila
rintu mu teṉṟamiḻ maṇṭalamuḻuvatu miḻantu Ilaṅkecanākiyavikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉai parumaṇi
var vallavar mutalinar vaṇaṅka viṟṟirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻanuyarn=ta perumpukaḻk kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājadhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu menmalait tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyār tevatā
vilaiyāvaṇakkaiyeḻuttu Atikārikaḷ puliyūrkkoṭṭattu melūrnāṭṭu melūr neṟkunṟaṅkiḻān kāmancentiracekara(n)ṉāna vāṉavan muven=taveḷār Eṅkaḷukku Eṅkaḷūr nilattil kāṭeṟāyum maṭuvāyum Oṭaivā
ttum Ōṭaitūrttum tiruttikkoḷḷakkaṭavatāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭukkinṟa nilattiṟku kiḻpāṟkellai neṟkunṟaṅkiḻāṉ nikarilikumaraṉ kuḷattu paḷḷattukku teṟkil maṭuvukku tenkaraivaraku paṭṭikku meṟku Ūr nilattukku teṟkil pukā
valai kaṭapperikaraikkum pāmpaṭaikkum vāykkālukku teṟkum Innilam Uḻu ku kuṭi Irukkaikku nilaṅkuḻi Ayirattaññūṟum Uṭpaṭa vaṭakiḻakku nokki Ikkālukku vaṭakku melpāṟkkellai koḻi muṭṭat
kku nokki toḻukkaṭṭai puṟṟukku kiḻakkum tikkaiyuṟavum vaṭapāṟkellai ṉakkovaykkum ten ṇuṭaiyān pūmikkum kkum Iṉnānkellaikkum ṉaṭuvupaṭṭa ṉilam patinaṟucāṇ
m Innilam Uḻuvārkkuk kuṭiyirukka puncey nilaṅkuḻi Āyirattaiññūṟum Ākakkuḻi pannirāyiramum mikutikkuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅka Innilattukku vilait tiravviyamum peruvilai Uṭaiyār paṇṭārattu vaitta kācu koṇṭu
taram Inṉān kellaiyuḷḷum naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam patinaṟucāṇ kolāl pannirāyiramum Uḷ Oḻivinṟiyey Āvaṇakkaḷiye peruvilai kāṇaṅ kiḻikaiccella kaikkoṇṭu A ḷe Iṟukkak kaṭavatā
yamum Iṟaittiravviyamum Innilattāl vantatu Aṟakkoṇṭu Irukālāvatu mukkālāvatum viṟṟukkuṭuttom Innāṉkellai naṭuvu menokkiya maramum kiḻnokkiya ki teṟṟiyum Uṭumpoṭu Āmaitavaḻntte
kkāl tokkaikommaṉpaṭṭattu ta teṟkkil tūmpil ninṟum pontu I nilattukku nirpāyap peṟuvatākavum Innilam Uḻaccantiracekaracceri Enṟu E kuṭuttom paḻaiyanūr paḻainūr Ūrom
m Uḷḷiṭṭu maṟṟum tirukkoṟṟavācal ponta Iṟai Epperppaṭṭatum koḷḷavuṅ kāṭṭavum peṟātomākavum Ipparicu viṟṟu vilai Āvaṇañ ceytu ṭṭu cilālekai ceytu m Atikārikaḷ neṟkkunṟaṅ kiḻān kāmancantiracekara
Digital edition of SII 41.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
